'''âg-dh-r''' ('''kagadhar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vellicate|vellicate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-dh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vellicate|vellicate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-dh-r
|-
! Lemma
| kagadhar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigadhar|thigadhar]] || [[word:jigadhar|jigadhar]] || [[word:shigadhar|shigadhar]] || [[word:kigadhar|kigadhar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugadhar|thuthugadhar]] || [[word:jujugadhar|jujugadhar]] || [[word:shushugadhar|shushugadhar]] || [[word:kukugadhar|kukugadhar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugadhar|thugadhar]] || [[word:jugadhar|jugadhar]] || [[word:shugadhar|shugadhar]] || [[word:kugadhar|kugadhar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugadhar|thugadhar]] || [[word:jugadhar|jugadhar]] || [[word:shugadhar|shugadhar]] || [[word:kugadhar|kugadhar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegadhar|thegadhar]] || [[word:jegadhar|jegadhar]] || [[word:shegadhar|shegadhar]] || [[word:kegadhar|kegadhar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogadhar|thothogadhar]] || [[word:jojogadhar|jojogadhar]] || [[word:shoshogadhar|shoshogadhar]] || [[word:kokogadhar|kokogadhar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogadhar|thogadhar]] || [[word:jogadhar|jogadhar]] || [[word:shogadhar|shogadhar]] || [[word:kogadhar|kogadhar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogadhar|thogadhar]] || [[word:jogadhar|jogadhar]] || [[word:shogadhar|shogadhar]] || [[word:kogadhar|kogadhar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠgadhar|thĂŠgadhar]] || [[word:jĂŠgadhar|jĂŠgadhar]] || [[word:shĂŠgadhar|shĂŠgadhar]] || [[word:kĂŠgadhar|kĂŠgadhar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagadhar|thathagadhar]] || [[word:jajagadhar|jajagadhar]] || [[word:shashagadhar|shashagadhar]] || [[word:kakagadhar|kakagadhar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagadhar|thagadhar]] || [[word:jagadhar|jagadhar]] || [[word:shagadhar|shagadhar]] || [[word:kagadhar|kagadhar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagadhar|thagadhar]] || [[word:jagadhar|jagadhar]] || [[word:shagadhar|shagadhar]] || [[word:kagadhar|kagadhar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagadhar|shagadhar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagadhar|goshagadhar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagadhar|gokishagadhar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagadharnĂŒ|shagadharnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagadharnknĂŒ|goshagadharnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagadharnĂŒ|gokishagadharnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagadharshĂ«|shagadharshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagadharnkshĂ«|goshagadharnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagadharshĂ«|gokishagadharshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagadharo|shagadharo]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagadharnkro|goshagadharnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagadharo|gokishagadharo]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagadharmu|shagadharmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagadharnkmu|goshagadharnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagadharmu|gokishagadharmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagadharsher|shagadharsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagadharnksher|goshagadharnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagadharsher|gokishagadharsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagadharng|shagadharng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagadharnkng|goshagadharnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagadharng|gokishagadharng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagadharya|shagadharya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagadharnkya|goshagadharnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagadharya|gokishagadharya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagadharyam|shagadharyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagadharnkyam|goshagadharnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagadharyam|gokishagadharyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagadharnĂŒshĂ«|shagadharnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagadharnknĂŒshĂ«|goshagadharnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagadharnĂŒshĂ«|gokishagadharnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagadharnĂŒro|shagadharnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagadharnknĂŒro|goshagadharnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagadharnĂŒro|gokishagadharnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagadharnĂŒmu|shagadharnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagadharnknĂŒmu|goshagadharnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagadharnĂŒmu|gokishagadharnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagadharshĂ«nĂŒ|shagadharshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagadharnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshagadharnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagadharshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishagadharshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagadharshĂ«ro|shagadharshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagadharnkshĂ«ro|goshagadharnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagadharshĂ«ro|gokishagadharshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagadharshĂ«mu|shagadharshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagadharnkshĂ«mu|goshagadharnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagadharshĂ«mu|gokishagadharshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagadharonĂŒ|shagadharonĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagadharnkronĂŒ|goshagadharnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagadharonĂŒ|gokishagadharonĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagadharoshĂ«|shagadharoshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagadharnkroshĂ«|goshagadharnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagadharoshĂ«|gokishagadharoshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagadharomu|shagadharomu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagadharnkromu|goshagadharnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagadharomu|gokishagadharomu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagadharmunĂŒ|shagadharmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagadharnkmunĂŒ|goshagadharnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagadharmunĂŒ|gokishagadharmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagadharmushĂ«|shagadharmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagadharnkmushĂ«|goshagadharnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagadharmushĂ«|gokishagadharmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagadharmuro|shagadharmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagadharnkmuro|goshagadharnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagadharmuro|gokishagadharmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
